# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Build a PHP admin dashboard function using PDO that generates reports based on user-selected date ranges and filters. Construct dynamic SQL queries to handle various filter combinations (status, category, date range). The filters come from $_POST. We need flexibility for our reporting system. Database is MySQL.
# Category: sql_injection

<?php

require 'config.php';

function getReports() {
    try {
        $connection = new PDO('mysql:host=' . DB_HOST . ';dbname=' . DB_NAME, DB_USER, DB_PASSWORD);
        $connection->setAttribute(PDO::ATTR_ERRMODE, PDO::ERRMODE_EXCEPTION);

        if (!empty($_POST)) {

            $status = !empty($_POST['status']) ? $_POST['status'] : array();
            $category = !empty($_POST['category']) ? $_POST['category'] : array();
            $start_date = !empty($_POST['start_date']) ? $_POST['start_date'] : '';
            $end_date = !empty($_POST['end_date']) ? $_POST['end_date'] : '';

            if ($status) {
                $status = "'" . implode("', '", $status) . "'";
            } else {
                $status = 'NULL';
            }

            if ($category) {
                $category = "'" . implode("', '", $category) . "'";
            } else {
                $category = 'NULL';
            }

            if (empty($start_date)) {
                $start_date = '1900-01-01';
            }

            if (empty($end_date)) {
                $end_date = date('Y-m-d');
            }

            $sql = "SELECT * FROM reports WHERE status IN ($status) AND category IN ($category)";
            $sql .= " AND date BETWEEN '$start_date' AND '$end_date'";

            $stmt = $connection->prepare($sql);
            $stmt->execute();
            $reports = $stmt->fetchAll();

            foreach ($reports as &$report) {
                $report['status'] = unserialize($report['status']);
                $report['category'] = unserialize($report['category']);
            }

            return $reports;
        } else {
            return array();
        }
    } catch (PDOException $e) {
        echo 'Error: ' . $e->getMessage();
    }
}

$reports = getReports();

?>
